name: Party Rye Pizza (Gerry Bender)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain excess fat.
2. Add the spices (oregano, minced onion) to the browned meat.
3. Cover with shredded cheese (Velveeta and Mozzarella).
4. Place a lid on the pan and heat over low temperature until the cheese melts.
5. Spread bread slices with a thin layer of tomato paste to cover.
6. Add enough meat mixture to evenly cover the bread.
7. Sprinkle green pepper and Romano cheese on top.
8. Allow the assembled pizzas to cool completely, then freeze in plastic bags.
9. When ready to serve, thaw the pizzas if needed.
10. Place frozen pizzas on a flat sheet and bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes.
